domain: Persian bagh terraced garden (Iranian classical garden; gravity-fed qanat water; topmost-terrace appearance + per-terrace pool + stepped cascade; pool simultaneously distributes and cools)
specific_mechanism: Terraced cascade with per-level pooling that simultaneously distributes flow AND cools the air; each pool stores+regulates+cools before passing to next level.
llm_application: BAGH-POOL: a hierarchical multi-scale transformer with per-scale (a) pooling aggregation AND (b) explicit intra-pool variance penalty. At scales s ∈ {16×16, 32×32, 64×64, …} apply pooling P_s producing pooled-features F_s, AND add training loss term λ_s × intra-pool-variance(F_s) penalising high variance within each pool. The combination forces progressively-smoother features at deeper scales (the 'cooling'). Differs from HMT/HMSA/GMSA (multi-scale attention/patch only) by adding explicit per-scale smoothness regularization.
novelty_claim: HMT hybrid attention hierarchical multiscale, HMSA brain-tumor patch-multi-resolution, GMSA grouped multi-scale channel attention, Cascaded Attention Decoding all use hierarchical pooling but without explicit intra-pool variance penalty. BAGH-POOL differs by adding the cooling term — λ × Var(F_s) — pressuring per-scale smoothness as an explicit objective.
